description: In October 2024, Alison was appointed as a non-executive director at Sellafield Ltd, chairing the Audit and Risk Assurance Committee. Alison holds a portfolio of non-executive roles, most recently as a non-executive committee member at the Department of Energy Security and Net Zero and as a non-executive director and audit committee chair at a large acute NHS Hospital Trust.   Alison’s career has spanned the private, public and charity sectors which has given her a breadth of experience from strategy and governance to transformation and stakeholder engagement.   After a successful career in the energy sector at Shell, Alison founded a start-up, working with high street retailers, to transform the sustainability of the cotton in our clothes.    Alison is a member of the Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (CIMA) and graduated in Physics and Materials Science from Cambridge University.   She is a Fellow of the RSA and a STEM Ambassador, encouraging more children to study “STEM” - Science, Technology, Engineering and Maths.

details.body:
In October 2024, Alison was appointed as a non-executive director at Sellafield Ltd, chairing the Audit and Risk Assurance Committee.

Alison holds a portfolio of non-executive roles, most recently as a non-executive committee member at the Department of Energy Security and Net Zero and as a non-executive director and audit committee chair at a large acute NHS Hospital Trust.  

Alison’s career has spanned the private, public and charity sectors which has given her a breadth of experience from strategy and governance to transformation and stakeholder engagement.  

After a successful career in the energy sector at Shell, Alison founded a start-up, working with high street retailers, to transform the sustainability of the cotton in our clothes.   

Alison is a member of the Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (CIMA) and graduated in Physics and Materials Science from Cambridge University.  

She is a Fellow of the RSA and a STEM Ambassador, encouraging more children to study “STEM” - Science, Technology, Engineering and Maths.

In October 2024, Alison was appointed as a non-executive director at Sellafield Ltd, chairing the Audit and Risk Assurance Committee.

Alison holds a portfolio of non-executive roles, most recently as a non-executive committee member at the Department of Energy Security and Net Zero and as a non-executive director and audit committee chair at a large acute NHS Hospital Trust.  

Alison’s career has spanned the private, public and charity sectors which has given her a breadth of experience from strategy and governance to transformation and stakeholder engagement.  

After a successful career in the energy sector at Shell, Alison founded a start-up, working with high street retailers, to transform the sustainability of the cotton in our clothes.   

Alison is a member of the Chartered Institute of Management Accountants (CIMA) and graduated in Physics and Materials Science from Cambridge University.  

She is a Fellow of the RSA and a STEM Ambassador, encouraging more children to study “STEM” - Science, Technology, Engineering and Maths.
Non-executive directors provide advice and bring an external perspective to business.

title: Alison Rodwell
